purpose: ingest the user's own sent Gmail prose (Google Takeout mbox, sent only) as an identity-baseline corpus, one entry per email, for the personal voice_profile baseline (not the impostor pool); the keyboard-composed counterpart to acquire_imessage_sent.
use_when: building the personal identity baseline from the user's own sent email, a keyboard-composed register, out of an offline Google Takeout export
do_not_use_when: the live Gmail API is the only source (this deliberately avoids an OAuth surface and reads a local Takeout .mbox instead)
a short-form mobile-composed register is wanted instead (use acquire_imessage_sent)

inputs.target: local Google Takeout mail export (.mbox); selection is From == --own-address AND X-Gmail-Labels carries the --sent-label-token

artifacts: recipient_map.json (redacted recipient_NN -> raw address; KEEP PRIVATE)

compute.cost_note: local mbox scan; no network; per-message quote/signature/forward trimming with a fail-closed residual-attribution backstop
